title: hieracium lactucella subsp. magnauricula
side_effects: Hieracium lactucella subsp. magnauricula can have side effects if used improperly, such as inducing allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in sensitive individuals. Prolonged use or excessive consumption of the plant may lead to gastrointestinal issues like nausea, vomiting, and stomach cramps. Additionally, improper use of Hieracium lactucella subsp. magnauricula can cause interactions with other medications, potentially worsening underlying health conditions. It is also reported to cause dizziness and headaches in some cases, especially when ingested in large quantities or without proper guidance.
